queries.question: Give me the genres that each music critic reviews.
queries.sql: SELECT Genres.name  from Music_Critics_Genres join Genres on Music_Critics_Genres.genre_id = Genres.genre_id join Music_Critics on Music_Critics_Genres.music_critic_id = Music_Critics.critic_id   GROUP BY Music_Critics_Genres.genre_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Music_Critics_Genres.music_critic_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Music_Critics)

queries.question: Give me the genres that each music critic reviews.
queries.sql: select music_critics.name , genres.name from Music_Critics_Genres join Genres on Music_Critics_Genres.genre_id = Genres.genre_id join Music_Critics on Music_Critics_Genres.music_critic_id = Music_Critics.critic_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?name2 WHERE {
  ?music_critics_genres a :Music_Critics_Genres .
  ?genres a :Genres .
  ?music_critics_genres p:hasGenres ?genres .
  ?music_critics a :Music_Critics .
  ?music_critics_genres p:hasMusic_Critics ?music_critics .
  ?music_critics p:name ?name .
  ?genres p:name ?name2 .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Give me the genres that each music critic reviews.
